backlog.title: Add Unit Tests for Email Service Functions
backlog.goal: Create comprehensive unit tests to ensure that the email service functions behave as expected under various scenarios.
backlog.why: Unit testing is essential for maintaining code quality and identifying potential issues before they impact users.
backlog.commit_message: test(mail): add unit tests for email service functions

history.summary: This repository appears to be a full-featured CRM or communication tool with a focus on email integration and customer conversation management. It leverages Node.js, Express, Prisma, and various other libraries for backend functionality.
